ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bus_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus line */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the bus line (e.g., active, maintenance, suspended) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the first bus for the day */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the last bus for the day */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of buses on the line (e.g., every 10 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus stop */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus line the stop belongs to */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus stop */,
  "stop_code" TEXT /* Code for the bus stop */,
  "location_easting" REAL /* Easting coordinate of the bus stop */,
  "location_northing" REAL /* Northing coordinate of the bus stop */,
  "wheelchair_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bus stop is wheelchair accessible */,
  "shelter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bus stop has a shelter */,
  "real_time_display" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bus stop has a real-time display showing bus arrival times */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the bus stop information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stops_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES bus_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_stop_landmarks" (
  "landmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landmark */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop the landmark is near */,
  "landmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the landmark */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the bus stop to the landmark */,
  "landmark_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the landmark */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the landmark information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stop_landmarks_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic condition */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus line affected by the traffic condition */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop affected by the traffic condition */,
  "traffic_status" TEXT /* Status of the traffic (e.g., congested, clear) */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of buses in the affected area */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the traffic condition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the traffic condition */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the traffic condition (e.g., accident, roadworks, weather) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_conditions_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_conditions_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES bus_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus position */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus line the bus belongs to */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the bus */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the bus */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the position was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bus (e.g., on schedule, delayed, off route) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_positions_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES bus_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, planner, maintenance) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view_bus_lines, edit_traffic_conditions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the permission was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "export_data" TEXT /* Exported data */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of data exported (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_data" TEXT /* Imported data */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported file */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of data imported (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was triggered */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
